simmiliar to final stats in a game like ZZZ, it's a unique multiplier stat
One that multiplies other multipliers as well
Final ATK = ( BASE ATK x ( 1 + ATK% INCREASE) + PARTNER ATK + GEAR FLAT + AFFECTION FLAT ) x ( 1 + PARTNER ATK% + EQUIPMENT ATK% ) + EQUIPMENT FLAT

In some games there is not distinction between fatk% and atk%, so all atk% would basically just go to "ATK% increase", but here it has a unique multiplier place "( 1 + PARTNER ATK% + EQUIPMENT ATK% )"
